steps.label: Basic Info
steps.helperText: Verify ownership and odometer consistency before checking body condition.

questions.label: VIN matches all documents
questions.helperText: Compare VIN on windshield and door frame with RC records.

questions.label: Odometer reading appears genuine
questions.helperText: Cross-check with service history and wear on pedals.

steps.label: Exterior
steps.helperText: Walk around the car in daylight and inspect every panel and wheel arch.

questions.label: Panel gaps are even
questions.helperText: Uneven gaps can indicate major body repairs.

questions.label: No rust at rear wheel arches
questions.helperText: Known Ertiga weak spot; rust here is expensive to fix.

steps.label: Interior
steps.helperText: Check comfort and electronics; cabin condition reflects owner care.

questions.label: AC cools quickly and evenly
questions.helperText: Test at idle and while driving.

steps.label: Test Drive
steps.helperText: Drive in traffic and open road to assess clutch, brakes, and drivability.

questions.label: Clutch bite and travel feel healthy
questions.helperText: City cars commonly show clutch wear around this age.

questions.label: Test drive observations
questions.helperText: Capture any vibration, pull, noise, or smoke details.

steps.label: Engine
steps.helperText: Listen carefully at idle and rev range for known DDiS problems.

questions.label: No timing chain noise on cold start
questions.helperText: Rattling from timing side is a critical warning.

questions.label: Turbo area free from oil seepage
questions.helperText: Inspect hose joints and compressor side for wet oil traces.

questions.label: No EGR/injector hesitation under acceleration
questions.helperText: Jerks or smoke spikes suggest fuel system servicing.

questions.label: Engine mount vibration is within normal level
questions.helperText: Strong vibration in cabin at idle usually means worn mounts.

questions.label: Capture clear engine bay photo
questions.helperText: Take one wide photo covering turbo side and hoses.

steps.label: Final Report
steps.helperText: Review critical risks, total repair estimate, and negotiation price.
